description: Full-page search dialog with keyboard navigation and result highlighting

attributes.name: open
attributes.description: Reflected state — set by open()/close() methods, not intended as initial markup

structure.description: Button that opens the search dialog

childAttributes.name: data-trigger
childAttributes.description: Marks the button that opens the search dialog. Falls back to first <button> if absent.

events.name: site-search:open
events.description: Fired when the search dialog opens

events.name: site-search:close
events.description: Fired when the search dialog closes
